areas.desc: You are inside of Nightring jail.
while waiting you look around and find many bones scaddered around, seems that waiting isn't good, unless your on a diet plan to get skinny like that skeleton
You found a hole to crawl through
You crawl throught the hole and now you are in the sewears now you have a dicision Left or Right
You go left and adventure far down through the dark sewears; you hit a dead end by a brick wall, but you hear the city through the wall
You go right and adventure far down through the dark sewears with many twists and turns but you see the light outside
